remarks: Nice 1.23-acre country setting surrounded by trees and wildlife. The building has exterior and covered garage parking. Ground floor common area includes a central elevator. Unit B7 is $2200 per month and has 2 offices, and a reception or conference are, kitchenette area, private bathroom. It is located on the second floor with elevator or stair access. Also available is a smaller first floor unit A2, with private office, reception area and private bath. at $1800 per month. Move in is available immediately with credit check, two references and first month, last month and security deposit to equal monthly rent to be paid prior to occupancy.
